name: salesforce-mcp
description: Connect Claude Desktop to your Salesforce org. Query records, run reports, manage approvals, invoke Flows — all in plain English. No code required.

username.title: Your Salesforce username
username.description: The email address you use to log into Salesforce

password.title: Your Salesforce password
password.description: Stored securely in your system keychain — never in plain text

security_token.title: Security token
security_token.description: Optional. Find it in Salesforce: My Settings → Reset My Security Token. Leave blank if your office IP is whitelisted.

client_id.title: Connected App Consumer Key
client_id.description: From Salesforce Setup → App Manager → your Connected App

client_secret.title: Connected App Consumer Secret
client_secret.description: Stored securely in your system keychain
